UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY, INCORPORATED AS TO DEFENDANT MATTA, ALFREDO DOES 1-5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

SETTLEMENT CONF. HELD, PARTIES REACH SETTLEMENT: JUDGMENT SHALL ENTER FOR POSSESSION AND RESTITUTION FOR THE PREMISES AT 467 TURK ST. #110, SF., CA, FORFEITURE OF AGREEMENT, BACK RENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,528 AND COSTS OF SUIT FOR PLAINTIFF. JUDGMENT IS STAYED THROUGH JAN. 5, 2004. DEFENDANT IS TO VACATE THE PREMISES BEFORE 5 PM ON JAN. 5, 2004 LEAVING THE PREMISES FREE OF ANY OCCUPANTS, POSSESSION AND DEBRIS. ANY REMAINING PROPERTY SHALL BE DEEMED ABANDONED. THE PREMISES SHALL BE DEEMED VACANT WHEN DEFENDANT HAS DELIVERED THE KEY TO THE PREMISES TO THE LAW OFFICES OF JOHN P. ZANGHI. SO LONG AS DEFENDANT COMPLIES WITH THE AGREEMENT, PLAINTIFF WAIVES ALL UNPAID RENT AND DAMAGES THROUGH JAN. 5, 2004. DEFENDANT WAIVES THE RIGHT TO RECOVER ANY SECURITY DEPOSITS OR RENTS. DEFENDANT RELEASE PLAINTIFF FROM ANY CLAIMS. WHILE DEFENDANT REMAINS IN THE PREMISES, DEFENDANT SHALL NOT SUBLET OR ASSIGN ANY INTEREST IN THE PREMISES. IN THE EVENT OF DEFAULT OF THIS PROVISION, PLAINTIFF MAY SEEK RELIEF FROM ANY STAY ON THE ENFORCEMENT OF THIS JUDGMENT ON AN EX PARTE BASIS UPON GIVING DEFENDANT 24 HOUR WRITTEN NOTICE. PLAINTIFF WILL VACATE THIS JUDGMENT AND ENTER A DISMISSAL SO LONG AS DEFENDANT IS NOT IN DEFAULT WITH THIS JUDGMENT. JUDGE, PAUL H. ALVARADO;REPORTER, BOB BALIAN;CLERK, T.MARUYAMA (DEPT. 305)
